arts.ttl: Lionel Messi DESPERATE to return to Barcelona
arts.sum: Messi has reportedly said he can't stop playing football until he's played at the new Camp Nou. Barcelona's stadium renovations are expected to be completed this summer, meaning the club will likely be able to play matches at the new stadium starting next season. In total, the Argentine scored 672 goals and provided 303 assists in 778 matches.

arts.ttl: Simeone praises ‘humble’ Alvarez amid match-winning brace at Valencia
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid coach Diego Simeone spoke to the media ahead of the Copa del Rey semi-final first leg against FC Barcelona on Tuesday night, addressing a number of questions on fitness of his players, taking on Barcelona and the fixture list. “He has the ability to transmit to the players the style of play he is proposing, I think the arrival of Flick has done Barcelona a lot of good,” he explained.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flicks calls for greater player protection after Lamine Yamal injury
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal suffered a nasty-looking foot injury in Barcelona's recent La Liga clash with Las Palmas.

arts.ttl: Flick named La Liga Coach of the Month for third time this season
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick has been handed another birthday present after being named La Liga’s Coach of the Month for February. This is the third time that Flick has won the coach of the month award since arriving at Barcelona in the summer.
